title: Develop event-based solutions
summary: Learn how to build applications with event-based architectures by integrating Azure Event Grid and Azure Event Hubs in to your solution.

sections.title: Develop event-based solutions
sections.summary: Learn how to build applications with event-based architectures by integrating Azure Event Grid and Azure Event Hubs in to your solution.

lessons.title: Explore Azure Event Grid
lessons.content_md:
Explore Azure Event Grid

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-event-grid/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Explore Azure Event Hubs
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Azure Event Hubs captures events and how to scale your processing application.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-event-hubs/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Develop event-based solutions
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Develop event-based solutions**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
